name: Zhejiang XCC Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang XCC Group Co.,Ltd produces and sells bearings in the United States, Japan, Korea, Brazil, and internationally. The company offers deep groove ball, double row angular contact ball, automotive generator, automobile tension, automobile clutch release, water pump, automobile steering and hub, automotive air conditioning electromagnetic clutch, high precision machine tool, chemical fiber equipment, tapered roller, and inch-deep groove ball bearings, as well as bearings for air compressors. It also provides thin, hub, middle and large size, middle and small, and cold rolling bearing rings; salt and oil quenching heat treatment, and precision high and general speed forging parts; and precision steel tubes, such as bearing steel tubes, and special tubes of air generator for airbags. The company also deals in auto parts and technical equipment. Zhejiang XCC Group Co.,Ltd is based in Xinchang, China.
